package rulecoverage

func PositiveServiceMethodReturnsMapStringAnyOutput() string {
    ruleID := "service_method_returns_map_string_any_output"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Services that return dynamic maps instead of typed result contracts."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
